options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: <value>
options.description: Specifies power in milliwatts during static power calculation or piecewise linear ( -pwl ) current waveform in ns and mA, during dynamic power calculation for cell or instance.

options.name: -ascii_power_file
options.description: Specifies the name of an instance list file. This file contains the list of instances in the format: 'instance_name power_value < pin_name >'.

options.name: -cap
options.description: Specifies slew to be used for instances above fanout_limit

options.name: -cell
options.description: Specifies the cell name. If the cell or instance name is not specified, the power will be distributed to all rails.

options.name: -clock
options.description: Specifies the power value for clock networks. list of clocks|all

options.name: -custom_macro_pwl
options.description: Specifies to use a custom trigger file to apply instance or cell PWL waveforms.

options.name: -default_dynamic_pgv_mode
options.description: default ddv mode

options.name: -dynamic_async_mode
options.description: Specifies instance or cell asynchronous mode.

options.name: -dynamic_switch_event
options.description: Specifies switch pattern with rise/fal time instead of cycle.

options.name: -dynamic_switch_pattern
options.description: Specifies stimulus pattern on the pins of an instance and cell.

options.name: -exclude_clock
options.description: Excludes clock networks when specifying a scale factor or power specification for the whole design. clocks to exclude|all

options.name: -exclude_ddv_modes
options.description: DDV modes excluded

options.name: -fanout_limit
options.description: fanout_limit defined by the user for slew/cap/power assignments

options.name: -force
options.description: Specifies to apply the set_power command even if there are Verilog mismatches.

options.name: -include_ddv_modes
options.description: DDV modes included

options.name: -instance
options.description: Specifies the instance name. If the cell or instance name is not specified, the power will be distributed to all rails.

options.name: -internal
options.description: Specifies the target internal power of the design, cell, or instance.

options.name: -leakage
options.description: Specifies the target leakage power of the design, cell, instance, or power net.

options.name: -no_propagation
options.description: Support post state-propagation user-defined dynamic switch pattern

options.name: -pg_net
options.description: The specified power or pwl for the cell, instance or design is applied to the specified rail.

options.name: -pg_pin
options.description: Specifies switch pattern to a specific pg pin on instance.

options.name: -pin
options.description: Specifies pin-wise power numbers for a specific instance.

options.name: -pwl
options.description: Specifies that power argument ( power | pwl ) is a waveform rather than a power number.

options.name: -region
options.description: Specifies region for power target.

options.name: -repeat
options.description: Repeats dynamic switch pattern of all the clock cycles in the simulation period.

options.name: -reset
options.description: Resets all specified options back to default values.

options.name: -scale_factor
options.description: Scales the power value by the specified scale factor.

options.name: -signal_net
options.description: Signal net name for power assignment to connected instances

options.name: -slew
options.description: Specifies slew to be used for instances above fanout_limit

options.name: -static_mode
options.description: static MvMf mode

options.name: -sticky
options.description: Applies the simulation based PWL waveform as is, to the specified cell/instance for dynamic power analysis.

options.name: -switching
options.description: Specifies the target switching power of the design, cell, or instance.

options.name: -trigger_time_adjustment
options.description: Specified trigger_time_adjustment will be used to shift tool calculated trigger time of a memory/macro
